feed.title: garden.errbufferoverfl.me - project
feed.description: An open collection of notes, resources, sketches, and explorations I'm cultivating.
feed.subtitle: Recent content in project on
feed.author: errbuffoverfl
feed.rights: This content is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International unless otherwise specified.

entry.title: anarchic illustrations
entry.summary: Drawings, prints and stickers promoting the abolition of traditional forms of government and institutions. All my anarchic themed illustrations are available as high-res downloads, available under CC by 4.

entry.title: Work in Progress
entry.summary: Work that is still in progress and being worked on. Freedom is not Given its TakenCheck it out on Ko-Fi →

entry.title: Character Studies
entry.summary: Little illustrations and spreads that have been created to explore the traits of characters, featuring my favourites from television shows, movies and my imagination.

entry.title: Vegetable Portraits
entry.summary: Portraits of my favourite and seasonal vegetables created using a variety of artistic mediums, they act as consistent theme that records changes in art style.
